products.title: Embroidered Cap for Bass Guitarists – Stylish Snapback Hat for Music Lovers & Musicians

description.plain: A stylish, adjustable embroidered cap featuring a bass guitar motif, crafted for musicians and music lovers.

unique_selling_points: Handcrafted with detailed bass guitar embroidery and an adjustable snapback fit for a personalized look.
metadata.top_features:
Detailed bass guitar embroidery adds a unique, artistic touch for music enthusiasts
Adjustable snapback closure ensures a comfortable, customized fit for all head sizes
High-quality cotton and acrylic blend offers durability and breathability
Versatile design suitable for concerts, festivals, or casual wear
Easy-care with gentle hand wash or spot cleaning to preserve embroidery
metadata.tech_specs:
Material: 80% acrylic, 20% wool (green camo: 60% cotton, 40% polyester)
Panels: 6-panel structured design
Closure: Plastic snapback
Eyellets: 6 embroidered
Undervisor: Green
Head circumference: 54.9–60 cm (adjustable)

media.alt_text: Embroidered Cap for Bass Guitarists – Stylish Snapback Hat for Music Lovers & Musicians

variants.title: Embroidered Cap for Bass Guitarists – Stylish Snapback Hat for Music Lovers & Musicians

description.plain: Elevate your style with this expertly crafted Embroidered Cap designed specifically for bass guitarists and music lovers alike. Made from high-quality, durable cotton fabric, this snapback hat offers both comfort and longevity. The detailed embroidery featuring a bass guitar motif adds a rugged, artistic touch, making it a standout accessory for concerts, rehearsals, or casual days out. This embroidered cap is versatile in size, with an adjustable snapback closure ensuring a snug, customized fit for all head sizes. Whether you're performing on stage, enjoying outdoor festivals, or simply expressing your passion for music, this hat serves as the perfect complement. Its classic design and vibrant embroidery make it an ideal gift for musicians, band members, or anyone passionate about the bass guitar. Care is simple—a gentle hand wash or spot cleaning preserves the embroidery and keeps the colors vivid. Designed with passion and craftsmanship, this handcrafted embroidered cap embodies authenticity and style that lasts. Show off your musical flair and love for the bass with this premium accessory that combines functionality with a unique, personalized touch. • 80% acrylic, 20% wool • Green Camo is 60% cotton, 40% polyester • Structured, 6-panel, high-profile • 6 embroidered eyelets • Plastic snap closure • Green undervisor • Head circumference: 21⅝″–23⅝″ (54.9 cm–60 cm) This product is made especially for you as soon as you place an order, which is why it takes us a bit longer to deliver it to you. Making products on demand instead of in bulk helps reduce overproduction, so thank you for making thoughtful purchasing decisions!

products.title: Bass guitarist slap technique - Two Tone Cap

description.plain: A vibrant two tone cap featuring a unique bass guitarist slap technique graphic, designed for comfort, style, and musical passion.

unique_selling_points: Exclusive two tone cap with a dynamic bass guitarist slap technique graphic and professional grade print quality.
metadata.top_features:
Exclusive bass guitarist slap technique graphic: Showcases your passion for the rhythm section and unique style
Premium two tone fabric blend: Ensures comfort and a stylish look
Professional grade printing: Delivers vibrant colors and sharp detail for a standout appearance
Fade resistant, long lasting graphic: Maintains vibrancy through washes and daily wear
Adjustable strap and structured front panels: Provides a comfortable, secure fit and maintains shape
metadata.tech_specs:
Material: Two tone fabric blend
Printing: Professional grade, crisp, detailed print
Graphic: Bass guitarist slap technique design
Fit: Adjustable strap
Care: Hand wash recommended; machine washable on cold, gentle cycle; air dry or tumble dry low; do not iron on print
Shape: Structured front panels

media.alt_text: Bass guitarist slap technique - Two Tone Cap - Black

variants.title: Bass guitarist slap technique - Two Tone Cap

description.plain: Own the Groove: The "Bass Guitarist Slap Technique" Two Tone Cap Feel the rhythm, embody the funk! If the thunderous pop and punch of a bass guitar's slap technique resonates deep in your soul, this cap is your perfect anthem. It's more than just headwear; it's a declaration of your passion for the low-end groove, a symbol of the energy you bring to every beat. Why You'll Love This Exclusive Two Tone Cap Exclusive Design: Showcase your love for the "Bass Guitarist Slap Technique" with a unique graphic that speaks volumes about your musical passion. Premium Print Quality: Our professional-grade printing ensures the dynamic artwork pops with vibrant colors and sharp detail, making your cap a true head-turner. Superior Comfort: Crafted for a comfortable, breathable fit, this two-tone cap will be your go-to accessory for jamming, gigs, or just chilling out. Versatile Style: Perfect for adding a touch of musician cool to any outfit, whether you're on stage, in the studio, or out with friends. Lasting Durability: Engineered for resilience, the cap and its amazing print are built to withstand the rhythm of your life, keeping your style fresh. The "Bass Guitarist Slap Technique" Design This dynamic graphic captures the essence of the "Bass Guitarist Slap Technique" – the explosive energy, the intricate fingerwork, and the undeniable impact of a bassline that makes you move. It’s an ode to the unsung hero of the rhythm section, designed for those who appreciate the power of the low end. Product Details Premium quality two-tone fabric blend for comfort and style Professional-grade printing technology for a crisp, detailed print Fade-resistant, long-lasting graphic that stays vibrant wash after wash Adjustable strap for a perfect, custom fit Structured front panels maintain shape Easy Care Instructions Hand wash recommended for best print longevity If machine washing, use cold water on a gentle cycle Air dry or tumble dry on low heat Do not iron directly on print 🌟 Satisfaction Guaranteed: We stand behind every product with our quality promise. Love your "Bass Guitarist Slap Technique" Two Tone Cap or we'll make it right!

products.title: BLACK LOGO CAP - PURPLE LOGO

description.plain: A comfortable, adjustable bassball cap designed for bass guitar players with a stylish logo and ventilation features.

unique_selling_points: Features a structured six-panel design with spandex and a sewn-in sweatband for a secure, comfortable fit during long sessions.
metadata.top_features:
Structured six-panel design provides a low-profile, modern look for stage and studio
Spandex blend material ensures a flexible, form-fitting fit for all-day comfort
Sewn-in sweatband and embroidered ventilation holes enhance breathability and moisture management
Permacurv visor with silver undervisor offers added protection and style
Adjustable fit accommodates a range of head sizes for versatile wear
metadata.tech_specs:
Material: 83% acrylic, 15.2% wool, spandex (white: 98% acrylic, 2% spandex)
Panels: Six-panel structured design
Crown Height: 3.5 inches
Sizes: S/M (6 3/4"-7 1/4"), L/XL (7 1/8"-7 5/8")
Color: Black with purple logo
Pattern: Logo embroidery

products.title: BLACK LOGO CAP - GOLD LOGO BLACK TRIM

description.plain: A structured mesh baseball cap with embroidered bass logo, designed for comfort and style for all seasons.

unique_selling_points: Features a stylish structured mesh back and embroidered bass logo for musicians seeking both comfort and style.
metadata.top_features:
Structured six-panel mid profile provides a classic, comfortable fit
Embroidered bass logo adds a unique, music-inspired touch
Permacurv visor with silver under visor enhances sun protection
Sewn eyelets allow for easy ventilation and airflow
Available in multiple sizes to ensure a comfortable fit for all head shapes
metadata.tech_specs:
Material: 83% acrylic, 15.2% wool, 2% spandex (white: 98% acrylic, 2% spandex)
Back: Structured mesh
Profile: Six-panel, mid profile
Crown Height: 3.5 inches
Sizes: S/M (6 3/4"-7 1/4"), L/XL (7 1/8"-7 5/8")
Color: Black with gold trim
